ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the property is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, condominium) */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "sq_footage" INTEGER /* Square footage of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "images" TEXT /* Images of the property */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., active, sold, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being listed */,
  "list_price" REAL /* List price of the property */,
  "list_date" TEXT /* Date the property was listed */,
  "listing_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing agent */,
  "listing_description" TEXT /* Description of the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_listing_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the listing being sold */,
  "sold_price" REAL /* Sold price of the property */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date the property was sold */,
  "sale_agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale agent */,
  "sale_description" TEXT /* Description of the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_sale_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_listing_id FOREIGN KEY ("listing_id") REFERENCES listings ("listing_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "agent_type" TEXT /* Type of agent (e.g., listing agent, selling agent) */,
  "brokerage" TEXT /* Name of the brokerage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agent_properties" (
  "agent_property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent-property assignment */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_properties_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agent_properties_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the market trend */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of properties in the location */,
  "sales_volume" INTEGER /* Number of sales in the location */,
  "days_on_market" INTEGER /* Average days on market for properties in the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trend_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the market trend type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the market trend type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market trend being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., regression, correlation) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES market_trends ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the analysis type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the analysis type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access event */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted to the role (e.g., view listings, edit sales) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission FOREIGN KEY ("permission") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_features_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trend_data" (
  "trend_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend data point */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market trend */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the data point */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trend_data_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES market_trends ("trend_id")
)
